hooks.command: if [ -z "$MC_TASK_ID" ] || [ -z "$MC_API_URL" ]; then exit 0; fi; curl -sS -m 3 -X POST -H "Authorization: Bearer $MC_API_TOKEN" -H "X-Mission-Control-Runtime: electron-local" -H "Content-Type: application/json" --data-binary @- "$MC_API_URL/api/hooks/codex?taskId=$MC_TASK_ID&hookEvent=UserPromptSubmit" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true

if [ -z "$MC_TASK_ID" ] || [ -z "$MC_API_URL" ]; then exit 0; fi; curl -sS -m 3 -X POST -H "Authorization: Bearer $MC_API_TOKEN" -H "X-Mission-Control-Runtime: electron-local" -H "Content-Type: application/json" --data-binary @- "$MC_API_URL/api/hooks/codex?taskId=$MC_TASK_ID&hookEvent=Stop" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true

if [ -z "$MC_TASK_ID" ] || [ -z "$MC_API_URL" ]; then exit 0; fi; curl -sS -m 3 -X POST -H "Authorization: Bearer $MC_API_TOKEN" -H "X-Mission-Control-Runtime: electron-local" -H "Content-Type: application/json" --data-binary @- "$MC_API_URL/api/hooks/codex?taskId=$MC_TASK_ID&hookEvent=PermissionRequest" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
